data.description: Research and evaluate RPC frameworks for knots' multi-language API: gRPC, Connect (Buf), Cap'n Proto, Tarpc, and comparable alternatives. Assess each on: (1) code generation quality for TypeScript, Rust, and Swift, (2) streaming support for event subscriptions, (3) local-first deployment capability, (4) binary/bundle size, (5) ecosystem maturity and tooling. Produce a decision document with comparative analysis and a clear recommendation or ranked shortlist with reasoning.
